title: bulbophyllum erectum
intro: Bulbophyllum erectum, also known as the upright yellow bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar, characterized by its upright yellow flowers. This plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum erectum include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially exhibiting anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically extracted and used in traditional medicine, often in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures.
